steps.title: Separate the fixed and extra costs
steps.content: The first 2 hours cost a fixed 950 dollars. If the rental lasts $t$ hours with $t>2$, the number of extra hours is $t-2$.

steps.title: Write the total cost
steps.content: The extra-hour charge is $50(t-2)$, so the total cost is $950+50(t-2)$.

steps.title: Match the equation
steps.content: The total is 1,150 dollars, so the equation is $950+50(t-2)=1{,}150$. That matches choice C.
